dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mean-reversion detected via zscore_20 < -1 (price below mean). Entry requires price below SMA_20 reference level. Exit when price reverts and crosses back above the mean reference (SMA_20). Lookback, threshold, half_life, and backtest parameters were AUTHOR_SILENT so reasonable defaults applied: zscore with 20-period lookback, -1σ threshold, 30-day max hold window.

backtest_rule.reason: Mean-reversion detected via zscore_20 < -1 (price below mean). Entry requires price below SMA_20 reference level. Exit when price reverts and crosses back above the mean reference (SMA_20). Lookback, threshold, half_life, and backtest parameters were AUTHOR_SILENT so reasonable defaults applied: zscore with 20-period lookback, -1σ threshold, 30-day max hold window.

source_rule_text: Buy securities that are mean-reverting when their prices are currently low relative to a reference price, planning to sell higher when prices revert to the mean.
